codeReview.summary: The .github/CODEOWNERS file was created correctly with proper GitHub CODEOWNERS syntax. It defines ownership for SPEC.md and the tooling/ directory tree (tooling/, tooling/ui-md-linter/, tooling/vscode-extension/) using the @Ola-Turmo/UI.md-maintainers team designation. All review criteria are met.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker self-corrected a file content issue during execution (transcript shows 'I see the file has duplicated content. Let me fix it'), indicating the worker identified and resolved a problem without external intervention. This suggests the self-verification process worked.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows worker created file, verified it, found duplicated content, then fixed it before committing. Final committed file is correct.
